summary: First-pass full E2E testing of GUEGON. Backend: 16/16 pytest passing including auth, prospects/campaigns CRUD, refresh/logout, stats, contact, AI email via Claude Sonnet 4.5. Frontend: landing, nav, pricing, contact, protected route, login (success & failure with French error), register, session persistence after reload, prospects create+delete, campaigns create, AI email generation (Claude returns rich French email), and logout all working. Only fix applied: added missing data-testid=nav-logout-btn on the dashboard sidebar logout button.

minor.issue: CORS_ORIGINS="*" with allow_credentials=True; code correctly falls back to FRONTEND_URL only, but having a wildcard env var is misleading and risky. Recommend setting CORS_ORIGINS explicitly to the frontend URL.

ui_bugs.issue: Logout button was missing data-testid=nav-logout-btn (NAV.logoutBtn constant existed). Fixed by testing agent.

issues: 'Funnel de prospection' (1000/820/351/117/31) and 'Activité récente' (Acme Corp / Lina Marketing / Q1 Outbound / 5 nouvelles réponses) are HARDCODED placeholder data. A freshly-registered user with 0 prospects still sees these numbers, which is misleading. Should be wired to real data or labelled as demo, or hidden when no data exists.

action_items: Replace hardcoded 'Funnel de prospection' numbers and 'Activité récente' items on Dashboard Overview with real data (or hide when no data).
Tighten backend/.env CORS_ORIGINS to the explicit frontend URL instead of '*' (code already protects via fallback, but the env value is misleading).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: clean and well-structured (~500 lines, no need to split). ObjectId is correctly excluded via _prospect_to_dict / _campaign_to_dict / serialize_user.
Auth cookies correctly set httpOnly + Secure + SameSite=None; verified session persists after reload via /api/auth/me.
formatApiErrorDetail in lib/api.js correctly handles FastAPI 422 validation arrays — confirmed: failed login shows 'Email ou mot de passe incorrect' string (not [object Object]).
AI email endpoint uses Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations as required and parses SUJET/CORPS format reliably.
Brute-force lockout NOT implemented (playbook asks for lockout after 5 fails). Not in MVP scope per problem statement but worth noting.
bcrypt hash format verified ($2b$) via successful login of seeded admin.
test_credentials: admin@guegon.io / Admin123! (seeded). Test users created via /api/auth/register with TEST_/uitest_ prefix.
seed_data_creation: Test prospects/campaigns/users prefixed TEST_ or UI_TEST_ or uitest_. Backend tests delete their own data; UI test prospect deleted; UI test campaign 'UI_TEST_Camp' remains for admin (negligible).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py uses pytest with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env. AI email test uses 60s timeout (Claude may take ~20-30s). Admin is seeded on backend startup. Cookies are httpOnly+Secure+SameSite=None, so use a requests.Session() to test authenticated endpoints.
